 /*Added as part of Accruals Q2FY19*/

 ,NIRM.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME /* ADDED AS PART OF Q3FY20 ICPM ACCOUNTING_RULE */
,NIRM.DD_COMP_US_ORIG_LIST_PRICE
,NIRM.DD_COMP_US_ORIG_EXT_LIST_PRICE
,NIRM.DV_TRX_FSC_YR_MTH_WK_NUM_INT
,NIRM.NET_PRICE_FLG
,NIRM.CISCO_INTERNAL_POS_FLG
,NIRM.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY AS ACT_REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY
,NIRM.WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT
,NIRM.BUNDLE_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME
,NIRM.BUNDLE_TYPE_CD /*ADDED AS PART OF NOAH SCOPE */
,NIRM.DV_ATO_PRODUCT_KEY
,NIRM.DV_BNI_FHI_TYPE_CODE
,NIRM.SK_SALES_MOTION_ATTRIB_KEY
 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_INV_REV_MEASURE  NIRM
 
INNER JOIN  $$STGDB.WI_RSTD_EXEC_CTRL_YE  WIRC
	ON  JOB_STREAM_ID='wf_MT_RSTD_INV_REV_MEASURE_YE_ACTUALS'
		
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_RSTD_REF_MONTHS  WIRRM ON  NIRM.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT = WIRRM.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT AND
									WIRRM.MONTH_SEQ_ID BETWEEN WIRC.START_MONTH_SEQ_ID AND WIRC.END_MONTH_SEQ_ID 	AND WIRRM.ACTIVE_IND = 'Y'   
 
 INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_RSTD_INV_REV_MEASURE_HIST WI ON ( NIRM.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY = WI.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY
 AND NIRM.GL_DT = WI.GL_DT 
 AND NIRM.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD =WI.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD AND  WI.DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG      = 'Y')
 
 WHERE  NIRM.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD IN ( 'POS','RCE_ADJ','AR')
AND  NIRM.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT>0

SELECT DISTINCT 
NIRM.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY,
NIRM.GL_DT,
NIRM.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD,
NIRM.DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG
FROM
$$FINLGLVWDB.N_INV_REV_MEASURE NIRM
WHERE NIRM.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT BETWEEN 200901 AND 201312
AND NIRM.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD = 'AR'
AND NIRM.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD NOT IN ('CM', 'DM')
AND NIRM.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT < 0
AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_RSTD_BKGS_SLS_CRDT_ASGMT NRBSCA 
WHERE NRBSCA.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = NIRM.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
AND NRBSCA.BOOKINGS_TRANSACTION_TYPE = 'ERP'
)

UNION

SELECT DISTINCT 
NIRM.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY,
NIRM.GL_DT,
NIRM.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD,
NIRM.DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG
FROM
$$FINLGLVWDB.N_INV_REV_MEASURE NIRM
WHERE NIRM.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT BETWEEN 200901 AND 201312
AND NIRM.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD IN ('AR-OOD', 'DRCT_AS_T')
AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_RSTD_BKGS_SLS_CRDT_ASGMT NRBSCA 
WHERE NRBSCA.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = NIRM.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
AND NRBSCA.BOOKINGS_TRANSACTION_TYPE = 'ERP'
)


UNION 

/*      THIS UNION  COVERS AR         */


SELECT DISTINCT 
NIRM.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY,
NIRM.GL_DT,
NIRM.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD,
NIRM.DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG
FROM
$$FINLGLVWDB.N_INV_REV_MEASURE NIRM
WHERE NIRM.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT BETWEEN 200901 AND 201312
AND NIRM.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD  = 'AR' 
AND NIRM.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD IN ('CM', 'DM')
AND NIRM.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT < 0
AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_RSTD_BKGS_SLS_CRDT_ASGMT NRBSCA 
WHERE NRBSCA.RU_AR_TRANSACTION_LINE_KEY = NIRM.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY 
AND NRBSCA.BOOKINGS_TRANSACTION_TYPE = NIRM.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD
)


UNION

/*      THIS UNION  COVERS POS        */


SELECT DISTINCT 
NIRM.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY,
NIRM.GL_DT,
NIRM.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD,
NIRM.DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG
FROM
$$FINLGLVWDB.N_INV_REV_MEASURE NIRM
WHERE NIRM.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT BETWEEN 200901 AND 201312
AND NIRM.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD  IN ('POS','AR')
AND NIRM.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT > 0
AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_RSTD_BKGS_SLS_CRDT_ASGMT NRBSCA 
WHERE  NRBSCA.RU_BK_POS_TRX_ID_INT = NIRM.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT 
AND NRBSCA.BOOKINGS_TRANSACTION_TYPE =  NIRM.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD
)

UNION

/*      THIS UNION  COVERS POS_ADJ, SLS_ADJ         */


SELECT DISTINCT 
NIRM.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY,
NIRM.GL_DT,
NIRM.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD,
NIRM.DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG
FROM
$$FINLGLVWDB.N_INV_REV_MEASURE NIRM
WHERE NIRM.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT BETWEEN 200901 AND 201312
AND NIRM.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD = 'SLS_ADJ'
AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_RSTD_BKGS_SLS_CRDT_ASGMT NRBSCA 
WHERE NRBSCA.RU_BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUM_INT = NIRM.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT 
AND NRBSCA.BOOKINGS_TRANSACTION_TYPE IN ('SLS_ADJ', 'POS_ADJ')
)

 NIRM.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
 NIRM.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,
 NIRM.DV_PRODUCT_KEY,
 NIRM.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD ,
 NIRM.DV_ERP_DEAL_ID ,
 NIRM.BK_SALES_CHANNEL_CD ,
 NIRM.DV_FMV_FLG,
 NIRM.DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD,
 NIRM.DV_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT,
 NIRM.DV_FUNC_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT,
NIRM.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,            
(CASE WHEN (NIRM.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY = -999) THEN RANDOM (1000000, 1001800)*-1 ELSE NIRM.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY END) AS XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY,
/* Performance changes, as part of APR- FY17 CDR */
NIRM.BK_SUBINVENTORY_NAME,
 /*PRMADDAL: Added below 4 columns as part of Q3FY17 RO SCOPE*/
 NIRM.XCAT_FLG,
 NIRM.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME,
 NIRM.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG,
 NIRM.ELA_FLG
,CASE WHEN NIRM.ADJSMT_RBT_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_KEY=-999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 
  ELSE NIRM.ADJSMT_RBT_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_KEY END ADJSMT_RBT_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_KEY
,NIRM.DV_COMP_US_NET_PURC_ADJ_AMT,
NIRM.DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD/*added as part of RO SCOPE*/ 
,NIRM.POB_TYPE_CD                   
,NIRM.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG   
,NIRM.DV_PRODUCT_SUBSCRIPTION_FLG /* added aspart of Mar 11th product subscription scope */
 /*Added as part of Accruals Q2FY19*/
 ,NIRM.TSV_ACCRUALS_CD
 ,NIRM.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY
 ,NIRM.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY  /*Added as part of MERAKI Q2FY19*/
 ,NIRM.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME /* ADDED AS PART OF Q3FY20 ICPM ACCOUNTING_RULE */
,NIRM.DD_COMP_US_ORIG_LIST_PRICE
,NIRM.DD_COMP_US_ORIG_EXT_LIST_PRICE
,NIRM.DV_TRX_FSC_YR_MTH_WK_NUM_INT
,NIRM.NET_PRICE_FLG
,NIRM.CISCO_INTERNAL_POS_FLG
,NIRM.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY AS ACT_REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY
,NIRM.WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT
,NIRM.BUNDLE_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME
,NIRM.BUNDLE_TYPE_CD /*ADDED AS PART OF NOAH SCOPE */
,NIRM.DV_ATO_PRODUCT_KEY
,NIRM.DV_BNI_FHI_TYPE_CODE
,NIRM.SK_SALES_MOTION_ATTRIB_KEY
 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_INV_REV_MEASURE  NIRM
 
INNER JOIN  $$STGDB.WI_RSTD_EXEC_CTRL_YE  WIRC
	ON  JOB_STREAM_ID='wf_MT_RSTD_INV_REV_MEASURE_YE_ACTUALS'
		
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_RSTD_REF_MONTHS  WIRRM ON  NIRM.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT = WIRRM.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT AND
									WIRRM.MONTH_SEQ_ID BETWEEN WIRC.START_MONTH_SEQ_ID AND WIRC.END_MONTH_SEQ_ID 	AND WIRRM.ACTIVE_IND = 'Y'    
 
 INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_RSTD_INV_REV_MEASURE_HIST WI ON ( NIRM.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY = WI.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY
 AND NIRM.GL_DT = WI.GL_DT 
 AND NIRM.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD =WI.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD AND  WI.DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG      = 'Y')
 
 WHERE  NIRM.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD  =  'SLS_ADJ'
